queries.feature_definition: Credit amount requested by the applicant.
queries.question: Empirical analysis investigates the determinants of credit default probability associated with the magnitude of requested credit amounts.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Academic research evaluates how the absence of a checking account contributes to elevated credit risk and default likelihood.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Financial studies assess the risk-mitigating determinants associated with maintaining savings below 100 DM.
